title: local_auth
objectives: Authenticate with biometrics (Face ID, Touch ID, fingerprint)

sections.markdown: `local_auth` gates actions with biometric authentication (Face ID / Touch ID / fingerprint) plus device passcode fallback. Uses LocalAuthentication (iOS) and BiometricPrompt (Android).

`local_auth` verifies the user is present — it does NOT protect secrets on its own. Combine with **flutter_secure_storage** (or Android Keystore biometric-bound keys via a custom channel) for real key-release-on-biometric flows.
Skipping iOS `NSFaceIDUsageDescription` in Info.plist — Face ID silently fails. Also: doing sensitive work in Dart based on `authenticate() == true` without any cryptographic binding.
Use `stickyAuth: true` so backgrounding doesn't reset the prompt. Offer a manual retry and a device-passcode fallback for accessibility.

flashcards.back: No — it authenticates the user. Combine with secure storage / keystore-bound keys to protect data.
Keeps the prompt across app backgrounding instead of cancelling.

quiz.explain: It's a presence check; pair with real key material for security.

quiz.q: For real key protection on Android use…
quiz.explain: Biometric-bound keys via Keystore are the strong control.

challenges.text: Gate a screen behind biometric authenticate().
Bind an AES key to biometrics via Android Keystore (custom channel).
Wrap secure_storage reads behind a biometric prompt with retry + timeout.

interviewQuestions: How do you truly bind keys to biometrics?
Face ID vs Touch ID differences?
How to handle biometric changes (new fingerprint added)?
